title: Cassette Discs 1.0
description: This Texture Pack turns the Music Disc items into Cassette Tapes.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f1b34a8dee897c910c0f5b32d71e9f1f1bab37.png)

**This Texture pack is focused on making the Music Discs look like Cassette Tapes.**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45b16c15e3ebdb34452341fed6895a179901fb62.jpeg)
I am not done with this pack, but I wanted to post it now so I can at least have something to show for my work. In the future, it will:
- Rename the Discs to Cassette Tapes
- Change the style of the Jukebox


This pack should support all game versions that use resource packs, however I have not checked myself.
